text:
Created attachment 207357
Patch

Update devel/py-robotframework-pabot from 0.86 to 0.87.

Add tests. I want to create a differential on Phabricator, since this is not a trivial addition. Upstream does not put the tests to the distributive package, and I had to checkout them using svn (or git).
